text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, today's your birthday, right? Spe and the
others are busy with the party preparations, so
make sure you free up your schedule for later.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man... I'm not a kid anymore, so do we really
gotta throw a whole birthday party?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Well if that's how you feel, I'll go tell
everyone the party's canceled. Be right back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wha—l-look, if everyone's already preppin', who
am I to stop them?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If you want people to celebrate with you, then stop putting on airs and be honest with yourself. Geez, you can be such a pain.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What's your problem? I'm always honest with my
feelings!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, right! Prove it by wishing me an heartfelt
happy birthday right now!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, happy birthday! You're not a kid anymore,
so how about you learn some composure?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What part of that was heartfelt?! You hypocrite!
